title: ctenopteris hombersleyi
intro: Ctenopteris hombersleyi, commonly known as the New Zealand fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ctenopteris hombersleyi include reducing inflammation and promoting healing, as well as potentially reducing the risk of certain infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and poultices to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
